name: Hyper Cakes
description: Hyper Cakes is a relaxing cake-making simulation! Cut cakes into perfect shapes, apply smooth cream, add textures, and decorate with delicious toppings. Enjoy ASMR sounds, stunning visuals, and interactive controls as you craft beautiful masterpieces. Whether youre a casual player or a cake lover, experience stress-free creativity and satisfying gameplay. Unleash your inner cake artist and play Hyper Cakes now for sweet, creative fun!
instructions: Cut cakes into perfect shapes Apply smooth cream amp textures for decoration Add toppings to complete the masterpiece Make the final perfect cut for satisfaction
